# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

# AWS CloudFormation Template for creating an Amazon Simple Queue Service (SQS) and a Topic in SNS setup 
Resources:  
    MyQueueNameParam: # Define the resource name parameter    
        Type : 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::String'     
         Name:/aws/sqs/queue_name.json      
          Default:'MyServerlessEventProcessingArchitectureSQS' 
          
   SNSNotificationTopic: # Define the resource name parameter    
        Type : 'AWS::SNS::Topic'   
      Properties:        
            TopicName:/aws/sns/topic_name.json      
            
# Set up IAM role for CloudFormation to create SQS and publish messages in topic 
   MyIamRoleForCloudformationAndPublishMessagesInTheTopicARNParam :     # Define the resource name parameter   
        Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'     
       Properties:         
            AssumeRolePolicyDocument:# Assuming that CloudFormation will assume this role. 
                Version:'2012-10-17'          
             Policies:[                  # Define the policy for allowing SQS operations and publishing to topic   
                 {                    
                   Statement: [                        
                       -Effect:@"Allow",                     
                           Action:"sqs:SendMessage",        
                               Resource: !GetAtt MyQueueName.Arn, 
                        ],                          # Allows sending messages in the SQS queue     
                    },                            
                 {                    
                   Statement:[                        
                       -Effect:@"Allow",                     
                           Action:"sns:Publish",        
                               Resource: !GetAtt MyTopic.Arn, 
                        ],                          # Allows publishing to topic   
                  ]                           
             }    
         
# Define the SQS queue with message retention and visibility timeout  
MyQueueName :      Type:'AWS::SQS::Queue'       Properties:        
        QueueName:( !Ref MyQueueNameParam )  # Set name of our resource   
            Attributes:[                    
                -MessageRetentionPeriod.Seconds, '60',            
                    -VisibilityTimeout.Seconds,'300',               ]  
    
# Define the SNS topic for pub/sub messaging          
MyTopic :       Type:'AWS::SNS::Topic'      Properties:   
        TopicName:( !Ref MyIamRoleForCloudformationAndPublishMessagesInTheTopicARNParam )  # Set name of our resource
